General.Name: Zenith Minerals Ltd
General.Description: Zenith Minerals Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the exploration of mineral properties in Australia. It explores for gold, lithium, base metal, caesium, manganese, tantalum, zinc, lead, and silver deposits. The company was formerly known as Zinc Co Australia Limited and changed its name to Zenith Minerals Limited in November 2010. Zenith Minerals Limited was incorporated in 2006 and is based in West Perth, Australia.
General.Address: 5 Ord Street, West Perth, WA, Australia, 6005
